description_long: This object is a vintage desktop computer setup featuring a CRT monitor, a full-sized keyboard, and a wired mouse. The monitor has a beige plastic casing with a thick bezel and displays a vibrant image of green plants on the screen. The front panel of the computer tower, integrated below the monitor, includes a floppy disk drive, buttons, and indicator lights, with the label 'WATSON' and 'HTC 1801' visible. The sides of the monitor are adorned with colorful stickers, including a heart, a flag, and the word 'hololive.' The rear of the unit shows ventilation slats and various ports, typical of older computer designs. The overall appearance is retro, with a slightly worn, matte finish and playful decorative elements.
description: A retro beige CRT computer monitor with a built-in tower, colorful stickers, and a classic keyboard and mouse. The screen displays green plants, and the unit features a thick bezel and visible front panel controls.
description_view_0: Front view showing the CRT monitor screen with green plants, the 'WATSON' and 'HTC 1801' labels, keyboard, mouse, and several loose keys.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thick monitor casing, colorful stickers (heart, flag, 'HIC'), and the 'hololive' label on the side of the tower.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying ventilation slats, multiple ports, and the back of the mouse and keyboard cables.
description_view_3: Right side view with more stickers, the 'hololive' label, and a clear profile of the monitor's depth and casing.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thick, rectangular, and made of beige plastic with slightly rounded corners. It has a matte finish and no color contrast, with the 'WATSON' logo centered below the screen.
attribute_stand_type: The monitor is supported by an integrated rectangular base that is part of the computer tower, with no visible adjustability features. The base is made of the same beige plastic as the rest of the unit.
attribute_button_placement: Physical buttons are located on the front panel below the screen, grouped together near the floppy disk drive and indicator lights.
attribute_port_visibility: Ports are visible on the rear panel, with several input/output connections apparent.
attribute_brand_logo: The 'WATSON' logo is present and centered on the bottom bezel of the monitor, in a simple sans-serif font.
